y.t:
[计] 原型
[医] 钇(39号元素)
y.d: n. the 25th letter of the Roman alphabet

y chromosome.t:
n. Y染色体
[医] Y染色体

y connection.t: [计] Y形接线, 星形接线

y level.t: 回转水准仪, Y式水准仪

y punch.t: [计] 12行穿孔, Y穿孔, 正数穿孔

y'all.t: n. 相当于“You all“, 美国南部使用, 意思是“大家”

y-.d:
Alt. of I-
 A prefix of obscure meaning, originally used with verbs, adverbs,
   adjectives, nouns, and pronouns. In the Middle English period, it was
   little employed except with verbs, being chiefly used with past
   participles, though occasionally with the infinitive Ycleped, or
   yclept, is perhaps the only word not entirely obsolete which shows this
   use.

y-axes.t: n. Y轴，纵坐标轴( y-axis的名词复数 )

y-axis.t:
n. 轴, 纵坐标轴
[计] Y轴, 纵坐标
y-axis.d: n. the vertical axis in a plane coordinate system

y-direction.t: [计] Y轴方向, 纵轴方向

y-directions.t: (Y-direction 的复数) [计] Y轴方向, 纵轴方向

y-front.t: n. 男三角裤, 紧身男短裤(一般前部有Y字形缝迹)

y-fronts.t: (y-front 的复数) n. 男三角裤, 紧身男短裤(一般前部有Y字形缝迹)

y-gun.t: n. 舰尾发射深水炸弹之装置

y-shaped.d: s shaped in the form of the letter Y

y-torque bar.t: [医] Y形支秆, Y形转矩秆

y-track.t: n. Y形轨道, 三叉形轨道
